headline.purpose: Section and card headings, modal titles.

label.purpose: Uppercase filter labels, column headers, kickers.

mono.purpose: Inline code in Methodology and Glossary content.

shadows.name: lift
shadows.purpose: Modal overlay and dropdown panel. Dark theme uses rgba(0,0,0,0.5). The only shadow in the system.

motion.name: ui-fast
motion.purpose: Hover and small state transitions on buttons, chips, cards.

motion.name: ui-standard
motion.purpose: Score-bar fill; animated via transform: scaleX, never width.

components.name: Verdict Pill
components.description: The single loud signal in a comparison row; one fixed colour pair per decision.
components.css: .ds-verdict { display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 20px; letter-spacing: 0.01em; background: #eeedfe; color: #534ab7; box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px #7f77dd; }

components.name: Status Dot
components.description: 8px activity dot, always immediately followed by its text label. Never an emoji.
components.css: .ds-act { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; font-size: 12px; color: #17161a; } .ds-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: #3f9142; flex: 0 0 auto; }

components.name: Accent Button
components.description: Primary action: Recommended stack, Export, Clear all filters.
components.css: .ds-btn-accent { font-size: 13px; padding: 7px 14px; border-radius: 8px; background: #eeedfe; color: #534ab7; border: 1px solid #7f77dd; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms ease; } .ds-btn-accent:hover { background: #534ab7; color: #fff; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Filter/search field with an AA-compliant placeholder.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; font-size: 12.5px; padding: 8px 12px; border: 1px solid #17161a33; border-radius: 8px; background: #fff; color: #17161a; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #67656f; opacity: 1; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: #7f77dd; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px #eeedfe; }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: Stack-builder layer filter; selected state takes the violet wash.
components.css: .ds-chip { font-size: 12px; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 20px; border: 1px solid #17161a1a; background: #fff; color: #56545e; cursor: pointer; transition: all 120ms ease; } .ds-chip-on, .ds-chip:hover { background: #eeedfe; color: #534ab7; border-color: #7f77dd; }

narrative.overview: Context Radar looks like a well-kept internal reference, not a launch page. It is a dense, calm, decision-support surface where colour does real work: five status dots and six verdict pills each map to a fixed meaning, always paired with a text label. The system is deliberately flat, on hairline borders, with one violet accent reserved for primary signal.
keyCharacteristics: Dense, scannable, low-noise; one loud element per row.
One violet accent, used only for selection, primary action, and state.
Status carried by a consistent dot and pill vocabulary, always with a text label.
Flat by default; a single shadow token for genuine elevation.
Fully themed light and dark from one token set, with an explicit toggle.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Signal Violet is the only accent; conflict and warning use the semantic red/amber tokens and nothing else gets a decorative colour.

rules.name: The No Literal Colour Rule
rules.body: Every colour in the code is a var(--token). A literal hex is a bug: add the value to the token set, do not inline it.

rules.name: The Fixed-Scale Rule
rules.body: Sizes are fixed px, not fluid clamp, everywhere except the single landing hero.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest; the Lift shadow appears only on elements that float above the page.

dos: Do route every colour through a var(--token); add a token before reaching for a literal hex.
Do pair every status colour with a text label, so meaning survives greyscale and colour blindness.
Do keep body and header text at or above 4.5:1 in both themes; Subtle Ink is the floor.
Do animate with transform and opacity, keep transitions 120 to 250ms, and ship a prefers-reduced-motion fallback.
Do give controls a 44px hit area on small screens and reflow the comparison table into per-tool cards below 720px.
donts: Don't inline a literal hex, rgb, or one-off colour in a component or stylesheet.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism, a big-number hero-metric template, or decorative gradients.
Don't add a tracked-uppercase eyebrow above every section, an identical icon-card grid, or 01/02/03 numbered scaffolding.
Don't convey status or meaning with an emoji where the status dot or verdict pill should carry it.
Don't use a colored border-left greater than 1px as a side stripe; carry severity on the coloured label instead.
Don't animate layout properties; use transform so the change stays off the layout path.
